goal.value: Implement PR-E: `ez merge --local` and `ez fold` commands in ez-stack Rust CLI. Add --local flag to merge, new fold command, git helpers, CLI args, and dispatch.

progress.value:
✅ 1. Added git helpers (merge_squash, merge_no_ff, rename_branch, update_branch_ref) to git.rs
✅ 2. Added --local, --strategy, --into, --force to Merge CLI + added Fold command to cli.rs
✅ 3. Implemented run_local() in merge.rs with squash/rebase/merge strategies
✅ 4. Created fold.rs with range parsing, branch folding, reparenting, optional rename
✅ 5. Registered fold in cmd/mod.rs and dispatch in main.rs
✅ 6. cargo check --tests: clean, cargo test: 170 passed, 0 failed
